title: sweech usage sparkline history
description: charts.ts has sparkline() but no historical data. Collect hourly usage snapshots for trend display.

context.text: Hourly snapshots in ~/.sweech/history.json, sweech usage --history shows 24h sparklines, launcher h key toggles trend display, auto-prune >7d. 29 new tests.

acceptanceCriteria: sweech usage --history shows 24h sparkline per profile
Sparkline renders in launcher TUI with m key
